title: Fig. 3 in A PCR-Based Method for Sex Determination of Cycas micronesica (Cycadaceae)
author: Fernandez, Michael Angelo P.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. Comparison of electrophoresed PCR products using (a) primer set developed in this study and (b) primer set by Liu et al. (2022) for sexing Cycas micronesica. Samples were collected from male (n = 5) and female (n = 8) C. micronesica individuals from Site B. PCR products of both primer sets were separated on 1.0% agarose gel.
steps_raw: Fig. 3. Comparison of electrophoresed PCR products using (a) primer set developed in this study and (b) primer set by Liu et al. (2022) for sexing Cycas micronesica. Samples were collected from male (n = 5) and female (n = 8) C. micronesica individuals from Site B. PCR products of both primer sets were separated on 1.0% agarose gel.
